top_findings.title: Archive missing all Java source files — cannot verify implementation
top_findings.evidence: find src/ -name '*.java' returns 0 files; only src/test/resources/application.properties exists; DB scores (test_coverage=1.0, code_quality=1.0, defect_rate=1.0) confirm code existed at scoring time
top_findings.suggestion: Re-archive the run workspace to include all .java source files from src/main/java/ and src/test/java/
